today_progress.focus: Completed baseline evaluation summary and selected the best current path for Phase 1.
work_completed: Executed and summarized the latest detector runs.
Compared available baseline outputs and confirmed YOLO11 as the strongest current candidate.
Documented quantitative performance and major error patterns for follow-up improvements.
Identified blockers for Florence-2 and Grounding DINO integration.

observations: Current YOLO scores are still modest because this is an early, small baseline setup with limited data/coverage.
Detection quality is currently stronger for mugs than books.
Primary failure driver is object occlusion; secondary issue is background confusion.

today_issues_and_blockers: Florence-2 pipeline is blocked pending explicit model wiring or a test predictor.
Grounding DINO pipeline is blocked pending explicit model wiring or a test predictor.
next_steps: Unblock Florence-2 and Grounding DINO execution paths.
Target occlusion-robust improvements through data and augmentation adjustments.
Re-run comparative evaluation after integration fixes and report deltas.
